author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Emission wiring complete. Choke point: added events: Vec<Event> field to WriteSet; write_commit_push appends per-attempt via new append_envelopes() helper (the single hub_v3 mirror site) and stages agents/<id>/events.log in the SAME commit. emit_compact_push refactored onto the helper. Retry: append is inside the loop so recover_from_push_conflict's reset --hard HEAD~1 discards the committed+working-tree log line and the next prepare re-emits — no double-append. rewrite_as_offline rewrites the trailing IssueCreated line to display_id:None to match the offline file; promote_offline_issues rewrites it to the new claim. TIME ENTRIES: SQLite-only (timer.rs -> db.start/stop_timer); never written to hub, so TimeEntryAdded is intentionally not wired. All 17 hub mutations wired. Gates: fmt clean, both clippy gates clean, lib 1965 / bin 2954 / cli_integration 194 all green.
